author: takitsuba
description: Automatically inserts bullet points when you type spaces or tabs at the beginning of a line.

manifest.author: takitsuba
manifest.description: Automatically inserts bullet points when you type spaces or tabs at the beginning of a line.
manifest.name: Auto Bullet

name: Auto Bullet

releases.author: takitsuba
releases.description:
## New Features
- Add support for numbered list cursor positioning with Home key/Ctrl+A
- Cursor now moves to position after number and dot (e.g., '1. |')
- Support for indented numbered lists with proper whitespace handling

## Improvements
- Add comprehensive test coverage for numbered list functionality
- All 13 tests pass including existing auto-bullet features

releases.author: takitsuba
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Added support for ignoring horizontal rules when adding bullet points
- Improved table detection to prevent bullet insertion in table rows
- Added detection for blockquotes and numbered lists to prevent auto-bullets
- Prevented bullet point insertion on heading lines
- Prevented bullet points in math blocks
- Ensured no bullet points in code blocks and on code block end lines

## Fixes

- Fixed Ctrl+A behavior: now moves cursor after bullet point in bullet lines and to beginning in normal lines
- Fixed various naming conventions, copyright notices, and UI text case issues

## Development

- Added unit tests for the Auto Bullet plugin
- Added .cursor directory to gitignore
- Normalized line endings to LF
- Updated development dependency: esbuild from 0.17.3 to 0.25.0

## New Contributors
* @dependabot made their first contribution in https://github.com/takitsuba/obsidian-auto-bullet/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/takitsuba/obsidian-auto-bullet/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

releases.author: takitsuba
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue where duplicate bullet points would be added when pressing space or tab at the beginning of a line that already has a bullet point.

This update improves the user experience by preventing unwanted duplicate bullet points in your notes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/takitsuba/obsidian-auto-bullet/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3
